summary: Video set to music with no speech, of Trump's arrival in Beijing: a wide shot of the floodlit Great Hall of the People with red flags, a slow shot of the Chinese flag against a black night sky, shallow-focus shots of crowds waving US and Chinese flags, the 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA' Air Force One fuselage, and an ending White House line drawing title card reading 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP'.

script.scene: Wide establishing shot of the Great Hall of the People at night, floodlit white facade with red Chinese flags and the national emblem lit above the entrance; a crowd of press and onlookers and a dark motorcade in silhouette in the foreground. Music, no speech.
Slow low-angle shot of a single red Chinese flag with gold stars rippling on a pole against a deep black night sky.
Shallow-focus shot from behind rows of greeters in light blue and white outfits waving small US and Chinese flags, with warm spotlights and a red carpet receding into the distance.
Crowd in soft focus raising red flags and US flags toward the Air Force One fuselage lettered 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA', tail number partly visible.
End title card: white line drawing of the White House on a black background with the caption 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP'.

notable_text: PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP; UNITED STATES OF AMERICA (Air Force One); tweet: 'The arrival everyone has waited for.'
